backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a service management system with CRUD operations for gym services and static business info for Bodyshape Fitness, including blob storage mixin integration.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three high-confidence features: fixing empty image gallery slot, updating gym address to 6424 Taylor Mill Road, and enhancing blurry facility photo quality.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files including components, pages, hooks, and configuration, documenting the Bodyshape Fitness website structure with updated address, testimonials, and red accent branding.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles defining OKLCH color system variables for light and dark modes with grayscale palette and red accent colors for destructive actions.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO meta tags for Bodyshape Fitness personal training in Dallas, TX, mounting React app to root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app component configuring TanStack Router with root layout and routes for Home (/) and Locations (/locations) pages.
Audio player component with play/pause, mute, and volume controls that persists preferences to localStorage and plays Bensound workout music track.
frontend/src/components/ImageGallery.tsx: Interactive gallery component displaying 12 gym facility photos in responsive grid with hover effects, modal dialogs for enlarged views, and enhanced first image plus new facility photo in last slot.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with sticky header navigation, mobile menu toggle, logo with Dumbbell icon, and includes BackgroundMusic component. Renders child routes via Outlet.
frontend/src/components/LocationCard.tsx: Card component displaying gym location details (name, address, phone, hours) with icons for each field and hover effects.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialsSect: Displays customer reviews in a responsive grid with star ratings, review text, reviewer name, and date. Shows a 5-star badge at the bottom.
frontend/src/data/reviews.ts: Exports Review interface and array of six 5-star customer testimonials with reviewer names, ratings, text, and dates.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor, handling authentication state and invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file for React Query hooks that would interact with the backend; currently exports nothing.
frontend/src/index.css: Global styles with Tailwind imports, custom CSS variables for light/dark themes with red accent colors, and font definitions (Inter and Bebas Neue).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the App component into the root DOM element.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Homepage with hero section featuring 20th anniversary badge, operations manager profile section, and includes ImageGallery and TestimonialsSection components.
frontend/src/pages/Locations.tsx: React component that renders the Locations page with a header, LocationCard component displaying gym address/hours/phone, an embedded Google Maps iframe, and contact information sections with icons for phone, email, location, and hours.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file that defines custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system with CSS variables, custom fonts (Inter and Bebas Neue), border radius variables, accordion animations, and includes typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state file documenting that this is a fitness gym website with known issues including incorrect business details, placeholder content, wrong location info, pink instead of red colors, and missing actual Bodyshape Fitness photos; includes architectural notes about extracting real content from Facebook/Yelp and highlighting the gym's 20th anniversary and #1 status in northern Kentucky.
